query:
UPDATE skills SET
                name        = COALESCE($2, name),
                description = CASE WHEN $3::TEXT IS NOT NULL THEN $3 ELSE description END,
                content     = COALESCE($4, content),
                updated_at  = NOW()
               WHERE id = $1
               RETURNING
                id as "id!: Uuid",
                name,
                description,
                content,
                created_at as "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                updated_at as "updated_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
